command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'

echo '=== RUNNER PROCESS CHECK ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "ps aux | grep -E 'moreno-delegate|moreno_hub' | grep -v grep" 2>&1

echo '=== RUNNER LOG ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "cat /home/jose/.local/state/moreno-unified-delegator/logs/job-20260625T123626Z-725c302a.runner.log 2>/dev/null; echo '(end of log)'" 2>&1

echo '=== CHECK FOR STALE LOCKS ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "ls -la /home/jose/.local/state/moreno-unified-delegator/locks/" 2>&1

echo DONE_1936
